ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_group" TEXT /* Group or category the borough belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the borough in square miles */,
  "density_per_sq_mi" REAL /* Population density of the borough per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Group or category the demographic belongs to */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_values" (
  "demographic_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic value */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  "demographic_value" REAL /* Value of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "at_least_one_dose" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with at least one dose */,
  "fully_vaccinated_cumulative" INTEGER /* Number of individuals fully vaccinated cumulative */,
  "perc_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "perc_at_least_one_dose" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with at least one dose */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., % At Least 1 Dose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the center is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vaccination center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., % At Least 1 Dose) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., time series, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being notified */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
